title: eurygania polyantha
intro: Eurygania polyantha, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of eurygania polyantha include treating menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and anemia, as well as supporting overall cardiovascular and immune system health. In herbal preparations, eurygania polyantha is often combined with other herbs to create teas, capsules, or infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
